articles.title: Clive Davis hospitalized in New York with respiratory infection
articles.description: Music mogul Clive Davis, 94, has been hospitalized in New York due to an upper respiratory infection. Admitted as a precaution, his team anticipates a swift release within 24 hours. This news follows his previous health scare with Bell's Palsy in 2021.

articles.title: Actor Ajith Kumar's mother Mohini Mani passes away at 84 in Chennai
articles.description: Actor Ajith Kumar's mother, Mohini Mani, has died in Chennai at the age of 84. Family sources confirmed the news. Political and film industry figures, including Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay and Kamal Haasan, have paid their condolences.

articles.title: 5 tiny kitchen habits that may be increasing electricity bills quietly
articles.description: There is no sudden spike or obvious mistake. Instead, the loss comes from repetition. A few extra minutes here, a little standby power there, and the numbers begin to add up. In homes where kitchens are busy from morning until night, these five habits can have a larger impact than many people realise.

articles.description: Cannes, France / Mumbai – Internationally acclaimed filmmaker and producer Tariq Khan has once again spotlighted Indian cinematic excellence on the global stage with the prestigious world premiere of his latest feature film, Bombay Story featuring Mouni Roy, at the Cannes Film Festival. Inspired by the powerful and unflinching literary works of legendary Urdu writer [...] The post Tariq Khan’s ‘Bombay Story’ Featuring Mouni Roy Premieres to Acclaimed Reception at Cannes Film Festival appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: 7 exotic indoor flowering plants that instantly add a touch of luxury to your home
articles.description: Elevate your home with stunning flowering plants. Orchids, anthuriums, and peace lilies bring colour and sophistication. Bromeliads and clivias add tropical flair. Jasmine offers fragrance and beauty. African violets provide charm in compact spaces. These plants transform interiors, creating a vibrant and welcoming atmosphere. Discover how living art can enhance your living spaces.

articles.title: JLo's child Emme graduates as Oskar Muniz- Pics
articles.description: Jennifer Lopez celebrated her child Oskar Muniz's high school graduation in Los Angeles, attending with her mother and son Max. Ben Affleck's son Samuel was also present, highlighting the blended family's strong ties. Oskar, who graduated in Theater and Studio Arts, will be attending university with his twin Max, a milestone that has left Lopez emotional about their impending departure.

articles.title: Hansika Krishna Leaked Video Row: Actress Issues Apology, Addresses Online Bullying Over Instagram Subscription

articles.title: Weekly Numerology Horoscope (1st June - 7th June, 2026): A Powerful Week of Growth, Confidence & New Opportunities
articles.description: Week 23 of 2026 arrives with a fresh and dynamic vibration that pushes people toward action, confidence, and practical movement. After weeks of emotional healing and inner reflection, the energy now becomes faster, clearer, and more goal-oriented. This week carries strong vibrations of new beginnings, leadership, career focus, financial planning, and rebuilding personal motivation. Many people may suddenly feel more energetic, ambitious, and mentally active. Situations that were delayed earlier may begin moving quickly now. The universe is encouraging you to stop doubting yourself and start taking practical steps toward your future.

articles.title: 'Blast' BO day 2: Arjun Sarja film jumps 56 percent
articles.description: Martial arts film 'Blast', starring Arjun Sarja, has seen a significant 56% surge in its second-day box office earnings, raking in Rs 1.95 crore. The Tamil version is leading the performance, with strong evening and night show occupancy. The film's action sequences and cast are drawing attention, promising further growth.

articles.description: Movie dialogue of the day: Om Shanti Om was taken from a song from Subhash Ghai's thriller Karz (1980), which also features in the opening credits.

articles.description: Weekly Horoscope - 1st June 2026 to 7th June 2026: This week can bring emotional growth, practical thinking, and fresh opportunities. The Moon enters Sagittarius on 1st June 2026 (evening), moves into Capricorn on 4th June 2026, and then enters Aquarius on 6th June 2026. Jupiter enters Cancer on 2nd June 2026. This can cause family-oriented thinking. Mercury and Venus in Gemini can improve your communication. This week supports long-term planning and emotional maturity. Explore Anand Sagar Pathak’s weekly astrology predictions to understand how this weekly horoscope cycle influences love, career, finances, and personal growth for all zodiac signs.

articles.title: Where to watch 'Backrooms': Streaming and theatre guide
articles.description: The highly anticipated horror film 'Backrooms,' directed by Kane Parsons, is now in theatres as of May 29, 2026. This unsettling tale of a mysterious door leading to endless sterile rooms is best experienced with minimal spoilers. Expect a streaming release later this year, likely around September, following a digital rental option.

articles.description: Prepare for an epic clash as 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 unleashes its final trailer, promising all-out war and dragonfire across Westeros. Premiering June 21, the new footage plunges viewers into a burning city and brutal battles, highlighting the devastating Battle of the Gullet.

articles.title: When Sunil Dutt revealed why he sought Bal Thackeray’s help during Sanjay Dutt’s 1993 case and his friendship with Haji Mastan
articles.description: As Sanjay Dutt remains one of Bollywood’s most talked-about stars, conversations around the turbulent phase of his life during the 1993 Mumbai blasts case continue to resurface even today. One such moment was veteran actor and politician Sunil Dutt candidly opening up about seeking help from Shiv Sena supremo Bal Thackeray when his son was arrested under TADA and the Arms Act.

articles.title: Before she became Queen, Princess Elizabeth starred in wartime pantomimes with Princess Margaret
articles.description: During World War II, Princess Elizabeth and Princess Margaret performed in Christmas pantomimes at Windsor Castle. These shows from 1941 to 1944 provided entertainment and raised funds. They offered a rare look at royal family life during challenging times. Surviving photographs show the young princesses in costume, highlighting a human side to the future Queen.

articles.title: The sweet moment when Prince Louis stole the show on the Buckingham Palace balcony
articles.description: Prince Louis's animated reactions during the Platinum Jubilee flypast captivated global audiences, offering a relatable human moment amidst royal pageantry. His candid display of enthusiasm and noise aversion, captured on the Buckingham Palace balcony, became an iconic image. This spontaneous behaviour, contrasting with formal decorum, resonated widely, making the event more intimate and memorable for viewers worldwide.

articles.title: “This is getting bad guys”: Twitch streamer Asmongold reflects on being 36, single, and isolated
articles.description: Popular streamer Asmongold shared his feelings of loneliness and a monotonous daily life. The 36-year-old content creator spoke about his solitary existence and repetitive chores. His candid admission resonated with many viewers online. The viral video has sparked conversations about isolation and mental well-being among internet personalities. Asmongold's honesty highlights struggles faced by successful online figures.

articles.title: Boston Rob calls out Jonathan Young’s post-finale comments after ‘Survivor 50’ loss
articles.description: Survivor legend Rob Mariano has spoken out about Jonathan Young's post-finale interviews. Mariano believes Young mishandled his exit press after Survivor 50. Young questioned winner Aubry Bracco's victory, suggesting jury bias. Mariano stated that jury management is crucial. He emphasized that players must build relationships with potential jurors throughout the game.

articles.title: Honey Singh opens up on life after divorce from Shalini Talwar
articles.description: Singer and rapper Yo Yo Honey Singh recently reflected on love, heartbreak, marriage and emotional healing, years after his divorce from former wife Shalini Talwar was finalised. Now, opening up about how the experience changed him emotionally, Honey Singh admitted that divorce taught him the importance of solitude and self-love.

articles.title: “Silence is part of the strategy”: Blake Lively reportedly taking calculated approach ahead of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce seem to be trying their best to keep things private as they gear up to get married in New York City amid the pop star’s strained bond with Blake Lively, just weeks before tying the knot. While the billionaire artist has maintained silence and has remained publicly distant from her former best friend, Blake Lively, it seems the actress is focused on improving her image.

articles.title: Male gaze: Pop cinema's biggest crutch?
articles.description: As mainstream films recycle brooding male heroes, this commentary argues for greater representation behind the camera. From Farah Khan and Zoya Akhtar to Greta Gerwig, it makes the case for broader cinematic perspectives.
